name: Fuji Apple & Radicchio Salad with Maytag Blue Cheese
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Gravenstein or Fuji apples, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy-bottomed skillet over medium heat.
2. Add sugar, salt, black pepper, cayenne pepper, and water. Cook until bubbling.
3. Add walnuts and stir constantly until well coated and sugar begins to caramelize (about 5 minutes).
4. Spread walnuts on a baking sheet to cool completely.
5. Assemble radicchio, apples, blue cheese, and walnuts in salad bowl.
6. Toss lightly with basil balsamic vinaigrette.
7. Season to taste and serve.
Combine dry mustard, red onion, and garlic in a bowl. Add remaining ingredients and mix well. Let stand at room temperature for half an hour so flavors can marry. Check seasonings and adjust if necessary. Do not refrigerate.
